channel.title: Architecture on Aman Goyal
channel.description: Recent content in Architecture on Aman Goyal

item.title: From Monoliths to Microservices: An Introduction to Serving Patterns
item.description: Big Picture Shift Moving from single-node patterns → multi-node distributed systems Systems are now: Loosely coupled Communicating over network APIs Coordinated with parallel + asynchronous calls Monolith vs Microservices Monolith Everything in one application/container Tightly coupled Hard to scale selectively Microservices App split into many small services Each service: Runs independently Communicates via APIs Why Microservices Are Useful 1. Better team ownership Small services → owned by small teams (“two-pizza teams”) Less coordination overhead 2.
